Defendant Smart City Networks Lp'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Lesinski of Seyfarth Shaw LLP telephone number 415-397-2823 for Defendant Smart City Networks, LP.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Smart City Networks LP'S Demurrer To Complaint is sustained with twenty days leave to amend to the first cause of action for intentional interference with contract, sustained without leave to amend to the second cause of action for negligent interference with contract, and overruled to the fifth cause of action for unfair competition. The first cause of action does not adequately allege the contract or contracts that defendants allegedly interfered with. If it can do so in good faith, plaintiff is granted leave to correct this deficiency. California does not recognize a claim for negligent interference with contract. The fifth cause of action adequately alleges ultimate facts supporting injunctive relief. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

Defendant Smart City Networks Lp'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Smart City Networks Lp'S Demurrer To Complaint is continued to June 23, 2016 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT SMART CITY NETWORKS LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 17, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 on the Court's motion.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/SB)
